# Setting up the experiment {#sec-setup .unnumbered}

This section explains the experimental method in detail. Please follow the instructions as closely as possible, and **report any issues and/or deviations from the protocol** using the {{< var link.issue >}}.

-   @sec-participants
-   @sec-stimuli
-   @sec-procedure
-   @sec-apparatus
-   @sec-validation

Once you have completed experiment set-up and data validation, make sure you have completed the steps in @sec-prior-checklist to request a "Green-Light" from Project Leads for data collection.
